boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the privacy-regulated export?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: DPIA-HEL-088: 'DPIA planning note DPIA-HEL-088 approves assessment planning only and warns that privacy status must be separately verified before transfer.'
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The DPIA planning note (DPIA-HEL-088) explicitly states that privacy status must be verified separately before transfer, which has not occurred. The export (EXP-HEL-088) and release authority (REL-HEL-088) do not contain this critical privacy-status class.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The privacy-regulated export requires a verified privacy-status class before execution, as per DPIA-HEL-088 and STD-HEL-088-P. This dependency is not met.

final_answer: The privacy-regulated export cannot proceed because a critical dependency, the verified privacy-status class, remains unmet. While the export and release authority documents are present, the DPIA explicitly mandates separate verification of privacy status before transfer. This unresolved status-class trap, as identified in the unresolved tensions, means the source boundary remains open, necessitating escalation.
